constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider evidence remains upstream and non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL supplies explicit replay references and lifecycle authorization before worker use.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: The worker performs bounded read-only replay inspection.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: The worker output is persisted as replay-visible inspection evidence.

known_limits: The worker emits an inspection report, not result certification.
The worker reads explicit replay references only.
Missing replay references fail closed before report replay is written.
Corrupt replay references produce FAILED_CLOSED inspection reports when the output path is safe.
